about: Report a bug to help us improve 11 Avatar Digital Hub
title: '[BUG]: '
labels: ['bug', 'triage-needed']
assignees: ''

## 🐛 Bug Report

### 📝 Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

### 🔍 Reproduction Steps
<!-- Detailed steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear description of what you expected to happen -->

### ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened instead of the expected behavior -->

### 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem -->
<!-- Drag and drop images here or paste links -->

### 🌐 Environment Information

**Desktop (please complete the following):**
- Operating System: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 126, Firefox 128, Safari 17, Edge 126]
- Browser Version: [e.g., 126.0.6478.127]

**Mobile (please complete the following if applicable):**
- Device: [e.g., iPhone 15 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S24]
- Operating System: [e.g., iOS 18.0, Android 14]
- Browser: [e.g., Safari, Chrome]
- Browser Version: [e.g., 22]

**Application Details:**
- App Version / Build ID: [e.g., v2.0.0, build timestamp from footer]
- User Role: [e.g., Admin, Manager, Sales Rep, Viewer]
- Organization ID: [if known, helps us check logs]
- Page URL: [e.g., /dashboard.html, /clients.html]
- Network: [e.g., WiFi, 4G, 5G]
- VPN/Proxy: [Yes/No, if yes specify]

### 📊 Technical Details

**Console Errors (if applicable):**
<!-- Open browser DevTools (F12) → Console tab → Copy any red error messages -->
Paste console errors here

text

**Network Errors (if applicable):**
<!-- Open DevTools → Network tab → Look for red entries (4xx, 5xx) -->
Paste network error details here

text

**API Request Details (if applicable):**
- Endpoint: [e.g., /api/clients/create]
- Method: [e.g., POST]
- Request Payload: 
```json
Paste request payload here
Response Status: [e.g., 500 Internal Server Error]

Response Body:

json
Paste response body here
🔄 Frequency
<!-- How often does this bug occur? -->
Always (100% reproducible)

Very Often (~75% of the time)

Sometimes (~50% of the time)

Rarely (~10% of the time)

Once (could not reproduce again)

📅 When Did This Start?
<!-- Approximate date/time when you first noticed the bug -->
Date: [e.g., 2026-07-16]

Time: [e.g., 14:30 IST]

After any specific action? [e.g., After updating profile, After bulk import]

🔗 Related Issues / PRs
<!-- Link any related GitHub issues or pull requests -->
Related to: #

Blocked by: #

Duplicate of: #

🎯 Impact Assessment
Severity:

<!-- How severely does this affect your workflow? -->
🔴 Critical - System is completely blocked / Data loss

🟠 High - Major feature broken, significant workaround needed

🟡 Medium - Feature partially broken, minor workaround exists

🟢 Low - Cosmetic issue, no functional impact

Affected Users:

All users

Specific role: [e.g., Admin only]

Single user / Specific account

Unknown

Business Impact:

<!-- How does this affect your business operations? -->
[Describe business impact here]

🛠️ Workaround
<!-- Is there any temporary workaround available? -->
[Describe workaround if any, or state "No workaround available"]

📋 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, hypotheses, or information that might help us diagnose the issue -->
📎 Attachments
<!-- Attach any relevant files, logs, or export files -->
HAR file (Network tab → Export HAR)

Console log export

Screenshot attached

Screen recording link

🤝 Confirmation Checklist
<!-- Before submitting, please confirm the following -->
I have searched for existing issues and this is not a duplicate

I have provided clear reproduction steps

I have included environment information

I have checked console and network errors

I have described the expected vs actual behavior

I have assessed the business impact

Thank you for helping us improve 11 Avatar Digital Hub! 🚀
Our team will review this bug report and respond within 24-48 hours.
